prompt:
Scene:
A square CGI or design-visualization frame with calibrated lighting, intentional composition, and premium material rendering. Build the frame around the same design idea pushed through surface richness and shader control. Keep the lighting, camera distance, and spatial organization tuned for a high-signal research image rather than a casual snapshot. The image belongs to the Cute Blind Box Figurine theme and should feel immediately legible as a prompt atlas theme for cute blind box figurine, testing physics-materials, style-transfer with gpt image 2..

Subject:
Center the study on the same design idea pushed through surface richness and shader control. Translate the theme into a concrete visual statement instead of an abstract mood board: the viewer should understand what kind of image this is, what is being tested, and why the composition is difficult. Use the slug idea of cute blind box figurine as a literal guide for subject matter, materials, and staging. If helpful, borrow the broad visual cues suggested by POP MART, PVC, studio, but keep the result original and specific to this study.

Important details:
The model must feel engineered or art-directed rather than merely stylized: edges, seams, translucency, reflections, and scale cues should all hold up. Preserve a disciplined square composition, clear focal hierarchy, and enough secondary information to make the image feel complete rather than underspecified. The image should look polished, novel, and exhibition-ready, with topic-specific credibility coming from the way surfaces, structure, and visual language reinforce Cute Blind Box Figurine. Avoid generic filler elements that do not serve the main concept.

Use case:
Cute Blind Box Figurine single study 3/8, testing physics-materials, style-transfer through the material pass variation.

Constraints:
No readable text, no watermark, no logos, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio, no real brand logos, no low-poly shortcuts, no broken reflections, no muddy materials, no generic showroom clutter, no unreadable UI overlays.
title: Material Pass
